title: 3D Avatar Emotion Grid AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable emotion grid with repeatable panel grid with one consistent subject, varied expressions, and clean modular framing. Grid layout with thin white gaps between panels and a subtle outer white border around the entire composition. Clean, modern UI aesthetic with slight rounded corners on every tile. Panel 1: Joyful (Yellow). Panel 2: Shocked (Blue). Grid. Subject: same expressive 3D avatar character repeated consistently in every tile. Panel System: seven rounded tiles separated by thin white gaps and one subtle outer white border. Emotion Set: Joyful yellow, Shocked blue, Stern red, Bashful pink, Confident green, Worried violet, Sleepy gray. Tile Palette: clean saturated gradients, one dominant color per emotion tile. Pose Language: large readable hand gestures, clear eyebrows, mouth shape, and head tilt for each emotion. Ui Finish: modern app-icon grid with slight rounded corners and polished studio lighting. Subject: Make same expressive 3D avatar character repeated consistently in every tile the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in a clean tile-sheet background where each emotion panel has its own color field and consistent rounded-corner spacing. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use seven rounded tiles separated by thin white gaps and one subtle outer white border. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in polished modern UI sticker-sheet rendering with consistent character proportions across every panel. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use clean saturated gradients, one dominant color per emotion tile. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
imagePrompts.title: 3D Avatar Emotion Grid Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable emotion grid with repeatable panel grid with one consistent subject, varied expressions, and clean modular framing. Grid layout with thin white gaps between panels and a subtle outer white border around the entire composition. Clean, modern UI aesthetic with slight rounded corners on every tile. Panel 1: Joyful (Yellow). Panel 2: Shocked (Blue). Grid. Subject: same cute mascot designer character with matching hair, outfit, and proportions in every panel. Panel System: nine-panel rounded UI grid with consistent margins, white dividers, and a thin white frame. Emotion Set: Laughing gold, Amazed cyan, Determined red, Nervous lavender, Proud emerald, Calm cream, Angry orange, Curious teal, Tired slate. Tile Palette: soft gradient backgrounds with crisp contrast between neighboring panels. Pose Language: full upper-body poses, exaggerated eyes, brows, hands, and mouth silhouettes. Ui Finish: minimal social-sticker sheet, clean edges, no text labels unless explicitly requested. Subject: Make same cute mascot designer character with matching hair, outfit, and proportions in every panel the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in a clean tile-sheet background where each emotion panel has its own color field and consistent rounded-corner spacing. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use nine-panel rounded UI grid with consistent margins, white dividers, and a thin white frame. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in polished modern UI sticker-sheet rendering with consistent character proportions across every panel. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use soft gradient backgrounds with crisp contrast between neighboring panels. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
